title: crotalaria reclinata
intro: Crotalaria reclinata, also known as the 'butterfly tree' or 'butterfly pea', is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria reclinata include its ability to aid in the management of diabetes, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria reclinata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
